tool.name: run
tool.input:
python3 -c "
from openai import OpenAI
client = OpenAI(api_key='7b75c3ecd0b2475aa56ee7fb9a84667d.BbK78bdUMIgrLHzW', base_url='https://open.bigmodel.cn/api/paas/v4')
resp = client.chat.completions.create(
    model='glm-4-flash',
    messages=[{'role':'user','content':'你好'}],
    max_tokens=50
)
print(resp.choices[0].message.content)
"
tool.output: 你好👋！我是人工智能助手，很高兴见到你，有什么可以帮助你的吗？
